MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge John E. Munter, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Judith Ossa.

Case settled by stipulation for entry of judgment. Defendant Worldwide Attorney Services Inc is to pay to plaintiff Chris Bickel $2,000. in care of plaintiff's attorney by Feb-01-2002. If defendant complies with the settlement terms, this matter will be dismissed forthwith. If the terms are defaulted, plaintiff will seek judgment for the award of the labor commission and attorney's fees.
